about_text: Hey, I'm Dieter! I am deeply passionate about software development. Coming from a technical background, I bring a solid understanding of how code and systems interact. I build solutions that don't just work in theory, but excel in practice. My goal is to leverage my hardware expertise to bridge the gap toward innovative software solutions.
mindset: OS-agnostic (Linux, macOS, Windows). I focus on efficient workflows; the terminal and SSH are my essential daily tools.
method: Analytical, persistent, and solution-oriented. I love diving deep into problems at the system level and creating elegant solutions through collaboration.
tech_description: My foundation is built on technical precision. Today, I combine my system engineering background with modern front-end technologies like HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. I see new frameworks not just as tools, but as opportunities to build more efficient solutions. In the fast-paced world of web development, my drive to constantly master new tech stacks is what keeps me moving forward.
interest: I have a special interest in learning
references: What my colleagues say about me
